query: UPDATE business_plans SET fundingPurpose = 'The L.A.W.S. Collective urgently needs funding to scale our technology-enabled workforce transition program. Our SaaS platform provides essential tools for transforming W-2 employees into independent business owners, but we require investment to expand platform development, enhance AI-powered business planning features, grow our contractor training program capacity, and extend community outreach to underserved populations. This funding will directly enable us to serve 100+ additional contractors annually and create 50+ new businesses within our target communities, generating lasting multi-generational wealth.' WHERE entityName = 'The L.A.W.S. Collective, LLC';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute UPDATE business_plans SET fundingPurpose = 'The L.A.W.S.
